name: QCV CV Builder Agent
description: An AI agent that helps users build professional CVs, score them for ATS compatibility, match them to job descriptions, and generate PDF exports.

skills.name: CV Builder
skills.description: Build professional CVs from user data with 15+ ATS-friendly templates

skills.name: CV Scorer
skills.description: Analyze and score CVs for ATS compatibility, completeness, and quality

skills.name: Job Matcher
skills.description: Match CV content against job descriptions and suggest improvements
